name: DiscoverGolf
address: 28915 N Herky Dr Unit 105, Lake Bluff, IL 60044
about: DiscoverGolf is an indoor golf training studio with a focus on junior golf development. The facility uses simulators for instruction and practice, with a strong emphasis on research-supported coaching programs for different age groups. While primarily a training center, it offers some adult and parent-child programs and keyless access for its Mastery program members. The facility provides a mix of group classes and private instruction, highlighting a low coach-to-student ratio to ensure personalized attention.
why_golfers_like_it: Exceptionally low coach-to-student ratios (4:1, often 2:1 or 3:1) providing personalized attention in group settings
Founder Richard Franklin is a nationally recognized junior coach with over 20 years of dedicated experience
Offers a clear developmental pathway with distinct programs for various age groups (Wee, Play, Mastery)

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any policy regarding outside food or drinks, nor does it list an on-site kitchen or bar. It is best to contact DiscoverGolf directly for information on their policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the time required to play a full 18-hole simulation, as the primary focus is on instructional programs rather than casual play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, DiscoverGolf is highly focused on youth development. They offer several programs specifically for different age groups, including DG WEE (ages 4-7), DG PLAY (ages 8-12), and DG MASTERY (ages 12+). The facility uses a fun, game-based approach to coaching juniors.
